name: Creamy Taco Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
2. Stir in taco sauce and cumin; set aside.
3. Spread the refried beans over the bottom of a serving platter or 13x9x2 inches dish.
4. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the beans, leaving about 1 inch uncovered around the edges.
5. Top with layers of lettuce, cheese, tomato, olives and chilies.
6. Serve with tortilla chips.
Yield: 16-20 servings.
